text.style: font-family: Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; font-weight: normal; fill: rgb(34, 36, 42);
text.tspan: convertToBase(amount, currency): currency == base or null

-> return unchanged, NO call. Else fetch live rate (Frankfurter). Fetch failed -> log + return original. Rate not finite or not > 0 (0/NaN/Inf/negative) -> log + return original. Else baseAmount = round(amount * rate, 2). The function NEVER throws; on any failure it degrades to the original amount
so an FX outage never blocks the cycle. Per-PO manual override bypasses the fetch. Every conversion stores rate + date + source; realized FX gain/loss is computed PO-date vs payment-date.
